title: Dunning Kruger Nuance Explained
script_summary: A concise exploration of the Dunning Kruger effect and its nuances backed by science.

segments.voiceover: Did you know ignorance can breed overconfidence?
It's called the Dunning Kruger effect. People with low ability often overestimate their skills.
But here’s the kicker: it’s not just about intelligence. It’s also about awareness.
Studies show that as people gain knowledge, their confidence drops. It’s a paradox.
Understanding this nuance helps us recognize our limits and pursue true growth.
Want to learn more about your mind? Hit that follow button!

Understanding this nuance helps us recognize our limits and pursue true growth. Want to learn more about your mind? Hit that follow button!
